properties.description: Copy all tables from PostgreSQL to Blob as CSV

query.value:
@concat(
'SELECT * FROM dbo.fn_move_to_history(',
variables('v_batch_id'),
',''dbo.stg_turbo'',
''dbo.turbo_valid_hist'',
''dbo.turbo_invalid_hist'',
''date'',
''', pipeline().parameters.filetype, ''',
''', variables('var_start_date'), ''',
''', variables('var_end_date'), ''',
',
variables('v_company_id'),
',
',
variables('v_business_unit_id'),
');'
)

source.query: select Pipeline_name,start_date,end_date + INTERVAL '1 day' as end_date from dbo.etl_configuration where isdeleted=0
